title: zmepeClient
description: Alot of awesome stuff that mods dont have, ct has which i ported to forge
body:
**This mod is supposed to Remove most of your ChatTriggers modules and have a few other stuff some mods dont have**
Player - Auto Sprint: Sprints automatically
- Autocorrect: Makes your chat pretty (configurable)
- Raw Mouse Input: Smoother Mouse Input (credits to subat0mic)
World - Weather Changer: Change the weather
- Time Changer: Change time of day
- Warp Commands: Example /d /f1-/m7, $d $f1-$m7 $is $museum etc...
Render - Inventory HUD: Shows inventory on screen
- Hide Gray Damage: Hides gray damage
- Hide Enchant Damage: Hides enchant damage
- Hide Soulweaver Skulls: Hides Soulweaver skulls
- Hide 0 Health Tags: Hides zero health nametags
- Hide Falling Blocks: Hides falling blocks
Misc - ESC Blocker: Disables ESC after opening the wardrobe temporarily
- Troll: $meow /removeac ,gc ,pc /giveac ,gc ,pc
- Trades Menu: Opens the trade menu on keybind
- Lofi Music: Plays lofi in-game
- Hotbar Scroll Disabler: Disables hotbar scrolling
- Slayer Tracker: Pb tracker /zcpb for help
- EtherWarp Ding: Plays sound on etherwarp
- Hide Skytils Messages/Errors
- Hide SkyHanni Messages/Errors
- Night Vision Disabler: Disables The Night Vision Effect
- Lag Detector: Detects server lag
- Death Announcer: Announces deaths in chat (Use ${name} for the player name)
- Anti Bot: im not getting a server to actually track bots
- Commission Highlight: Highlights commissions that is/isnt completed
- Bazaar Notifier: Tracks and notifies you about bazaar order fills and matches
- Auto Update: Automatically checks for and installs updates
Dungeons - Auto Party Chat: Automatically switches to party chat when you join a party
- Bat Death Detector: Detects bat death and notifies you
- Death Sound: pls turn this shit down to 10%
- Autokick: Automatically kicks people view side menu
- Shitter List: Kicks Unwanted classes view side menu
- P3 Timer: Displays P3 timer
- Barrier Timer: Shows the tick timer in P3
- Bonzo Pop: Tells the party when your bonzo, phoenix, spirit pops
- Blood Room Announcer: Announces when blood isready and done
- Dungeon Chest Profit Tracker: Tracks chests opened, total and session profit and shows average profit per chest
- Duplex Dot: Shows red dot on Duplex Term
- Pre-4 Tracker: Announces pre-4 done/not done in party chat Displays title + sound
- Leap Message: Automatically sends leap message (Use ${player} for the player name) - Rag axe alert - notifies you when to rag axe in p5 - P4 Destroyer tells you what block to mine in p4 so the platform doesnt despawn
Theme - Default Theme
- Blue Theme
- Custom Title: idk i added config cause ppl might not want
- Custom Main Menu: idk i added config cause ppl might not want
- Remove [ZC] and [zmepeClient] from messages - Discord RPC: Custom Discord RPC
